description: Cross-client tombstone (soft-delete) signature lock. The editor signs the canonical 64-byte tombstone transcript (mosaic-domain: 'Mosaic_Tombstone_v1' || version || album_id || epoch_id_le || photo_id || version_created_le) with the per-epoch Ed25519 ManifestSigningSecretKey. The sync visitor recomputes the transcript from authoritative server fields and verifies the signature against the album's published epoch signing pubkey before purging local state — without a valid signature, the visitor refuses to honor the tombstone (audit 'sync C2 (unauthenticated tombstones)' / batch 5). Ed25519 (RFC 8032) is deterministic given a fixed seed + message, so all three client implementations (Rust, WASM, UniFFI) MUST produce the exact signature bytes locked here.

negativeCases.name: tampered-transcript-album-id
negativeCases.rationale: The Ed25519 signature is bound to the album_id; a server cross-mounting a tombstone fails verification.

negativeCases.name: tampered-transcript-epoch-id
negativeCases.rationale: epoch_id is little-endian-encoded into the transcript so a stale-epoch deletion replay fails verification.

negativeCases.name: tampered-transcript-photo-id
negativeCases.rationale: photo_id binding prevents a server from cross-mounting one photo's tombstone onto another.

negativeCases.name: tampered-transcript-version-created
negativeCases.rationale: version_created prevents a stale tombstone from being replayed against a re-uploaded photo.

negativeCases.name: tampered-signature
negativeCases.rationale: Ed25519 strict verify rejects any modification of the signature bytes.

negativeCases.name: wrong-pubkey
mutations: verify with a different 32-byte pubkey (e.g. all-0x55)
negativeCases.rationale: Cross-key substitution must fail — the visitor only trusts the album's published epoch signing pubkey.

serverBoundOutputs.name: transcriptBytes
serverBoundOutputs.reason: The transcript embeds server-visible fields (album_id, epoch_id, photo_id, version_created) and is reconstructed server-side only as a verification input.

serverBoundOutputs.name: signature
serverBoundOutputs.reason: Ed25519 signature is stored in the manifests.tombstone_signature column and re-emitted in sync responses.

serverBoundOutputs.name: signerEpochId
serverBoundOutputs.reason: Signer epoch is needed by the visitor to look up the correct pubkey.

forbiddenServerOutputs.name: signingSeed
forbiddenServerOutputs.reason: The per-epoch signing seed never leaves the client — only its derived pubkey is published.
